name: profiles
title: Profiles
description: Public creator profiles: bio, free-text skills, experience, location, education, and social links. A faithful port of a private predecessor-system's worker/profile model, not part of this repo -- id is the id of the account it belongs to (one profile per user), not a separately generated record id. skills is a plain free-text field, matching the source: NOT a relation, NOT a skills-matching taxonomy. The source model also carried commented-out rating/review stub fields; those were never built there and are not built here -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills
fields.help: Free text, e.g. "Python, woodworking, tax prep" -- carried from the source as-is. Not a relation to a skills collection and not matched against anything; there is no availability field and no marketplace matching in this package.

fields.name: social_links
fields.label: Social Links
fields.help: One URL per line (or a JSON array of URLs) -- either shape is accepted; this package renders whichever it finds without imposing its own format on the source data.

fields.name: is_active
fields.label: Active
fields.help: Inactive profiles are carried but not surfaced as a hidden-from-public-page flag in v1 -- the public read rule has no row_filter on this field (see permissions/rules.json); hiding inactive profiles from /u/{username} is a straightforward later addition, not built here.
